cards.text: How many notes just say 'New Note' because {NAME} opened one and instantly forgot why, right now?
What percent is {NAME}'s battery sitting at right now — red, unbothered, nowhere near a charger?
cards.receiptSurface: Settings > Battery, the percentage right now

cards.text: How many unread emails is {NAME} letting quietly rot in the pile right now?
Seconds before {NAME} taps out and lunges for milk after one genuinely hot wing?
cards.receiptSurface: someone has hot sauce, run it

cards.text: How many icons on {NAME}'s home screen are wearing a little red number they refuse to acknowledge?
cards.receiptSurface: home screen > count the icons showing a badge

cards.text: How many tabs is {NAME} keeping alive right now, each one a solemn promise to read it later?
How many times did {NAME} reach for the little glowing brick today, pure reflex, no reason?
How many plays has {NAME}'s single most-played song racked up — a number that explains a great deal?
cards.receiptSurface: music library > top song, lifetime play count

cards.text: Freezing-water plunges does {NAME} have photo proof of this year, all because someone said 'bet you won't'?
cards.receiptSurface: Photos > this year, the shivering evidence

cards.text: All-you-can-eat visits did the map log for {NAME} this month, each one entered like a title fight?
cards.receiptSurface: Maps > Your Timeline, buffet visits this month

cards.text: How many dollars has {NAME} scratched into losing tickets at the corner store this month?
How many voice memos are just {NAME} humming a song they swore they'd finish one day, right now?
Hours did {NAME} stay unconscious in one unbroken shot this month — hibernation with a start time?
What's {NAME}'s resting heart rate reading right now — monk or hunted rabbit?
How many boxes has {NAME} ordered to their porch this week and forgotten were coming?
How many cables has {NAME} re-bought this month with a drawer already full of them?
How many candles is {NAME} burning right now purely to out-argue whatever the kitchen is doing?
How many clean forks does {NAME} have left before the sink wins and dinner goes spoons-only?
cards.receiptSurface: open the drawer, count clean forks

cards.text: How many condiments in {NAME}'s fridge door expired under a former president, still standing sentry?
cards.receiptSurface: open the fridge door, read the dates

cards.text: How many days has the same pan been 'soaking' in {NAME}'s sink, basically a protected wetland now?
How many days has {NAME}'s dishwasher held clean dishes hostage while everyone eats off the spares?
cards.receiptSurface: walk over and open the dishwasher

cards.text: How many days of clothes carpet {NAME}'s floor, clean and dirty in a truce no one can referee?
cards.receiptSurface: a look at the bedroom floor

cards.text: How many dollars in parking tickets is {NAME} pretending don't exist this month?
How many dollars is {NAME} paying this month for a gym they last set foot in another season?
How many energy drinks has {NAME} put down today, before the sun even filed for overtime?
cards.receiptSurface: go to the bin, count today's cans out on the table

cards.text: How many foil-wrapped mysteries are entombed in {NAME}'s freezer, unlabeled and older than the lease?
How many photos did {NAME} delete but not really, still lurking in the trash bin, right now?
How many photos of {NAME}'s own face got taken this month? Just this month.
How many subscriptions is {NAME} funding this month for things they forgot they own?
How many voicemails has {NAME} left glowing and unheard, flat refusing to listen, right now?
Total hours {NAME} slept this week — well-rested icon or running purely on spite and rage?
How many containers in {NAME}'s fridge are quietly growing something with opinions right now?
How many crusted mugs are colonizing {NAME}'s nightstand right now, each a separate failed civilization?
How many days has that knotted trash bag guarded {NAME}'s door instead of ever meeting the curb?
cards.receiptSurface: a look by the front door

cards.text: How many dishes are fossilizing in {NAME}'s sink right now, structurally load-bearing at this point?
cards.receiptSurface: go photograph the sink, no tidying

cards.text: Hours old was that delivery when {NAME} finished it cold for breakfast — check the order timestamp?
cards.receiptSurface: delivery order history > last night's timestamp

cards.text: Months since {NAME} last bought a sponge — the one in service now smells like a decision?
cards.receiptSurface: order history / store > last sponge purchase date

cards.text: How many days past its printed date is the milk in {NAME}'s fridge right now, still in active service?
cards.receiptSurface: walk to the fridge, read the date out loud

cards.text: How many wet towels has {NAME} left to sour in a heap on the bathroom floor right now?
cards.receiptSurface: a look at the bathroom floor

cards.text: Rotisserie chickens has {NAME} bought this month, per the receipts, a plate never once involved?
cards.receiptSurface: grocery > itemized digital receipts, this month

cards.text: How many at this table have re-quoted a statistic {NAME} invented on the spot, straight-faced?
cards.receiptSurface: hands up around the table, count them

cards.text: How many people in {NAME}'s contacts are saved under a petty nickname instead of a real name?
How many people here have killed the lights to physically evict {NAME} from a party?
cards.receiptSurface: hands up at this table, count the evictors

cards.text: How many networks does {NAME}'s pocket still remember the passwords to, all time?
Dollars has {NAME} paid a professional this year purely to undo a repair {NAME} already 'finished'?
cards.receiptSurface: bank app > this year's service payments

cards.text: Condiment packets is {NAME} hoarding in one drawer for an apocalypse that never comes?
Dollars of fresh groceries {NAME} bought this month, then composted untouched with the good intentions?
cards.receiptSurface: bank app, plus a look in the crisper

cards.text: Dollars {NAME} dropped on gas-station snacks this week without buying one drop of gas?
Dollars {NAME} paid in surge to be driven 1.2 miles this month, legs fully working?
How many alarms does {NAME} have set right now, most of which they'll sleep straight through?
How many contacts has {NAME} flagged 'Do Not Answer' or something far worse, right now?
How many days this week did {NAME} buy lunch out with a packed fridge waiting at home?
How many empty takeout tubs is {NAME} hoarding as 'Tupperware' right now, a matching lid for none?
How many overdue reminders is {NAME} letting blink, unbothered, right now?
How many shopping carts has {NAME} filled to the brim and abandoned at checkout this week?
How many steps has {NAME} actually walked today, or did the couch win again?
How many pans in {NAME}'s kitchen wear a permanent scorch from a meal the smoke alarm reviewed?
cards.receiptSurface: go to the kitchen, line the pans up on the counter

cards.text: How many times this week does the map catch {NAME} back at the same corner store?
How many seconds can {NAME} hold their breath before gasping, timed live at this table?
'Quick' hikes {NAME} has gotten the entire group hopelessly lost on and survived, all time?
cards.receiptSurface: everyone who got lost with them raises a hand — count the hands

cards.text: How many times did {NAME} order a whole second dinner this week because the first 'didn't count'?
How many days straight does this exact hoodie show up on {NAME} in this month's photos?
cards.receiptSurface: Photos > this month, count the repeat outfit

cards.text: How many half-typed messages did {NAME} chicken out of sending, saved as drafts right now?
Times {NAME} swore they were 'five minutes away' while still fully horizontal in bed this week?
How many times did {NAME} type 'haha' this month while feeling absolutely nothing at all?
Fries has {NAME} stolen off other people's plates 'just to help finish them' this week?
Months since {NAME} last bought anything capable of cleaning a shower, the tile keeping its own diary?
cards.receiptSurface: order history / store > cleaning supplies, last purchase

cards.text: How many things are in {NAME}'s bed right now that are not bedding — go photograph it, no tidying?
cards.receiptSurface: go photograph the bed as-is, count what should not be there

cards.text: Dollars did {NAME} get auto-charged this month for bar tabs they walked away from and never closed?
cards.receiptSurface: bank app > bar charges with auto-gratuity

cards.text: Dollars {NAME} pulled from a cash machine after 1am this month, intentions unspeakable?
Establishments where {NAME} is, by mutual understanding, permanently no longer welcome, all time?
cards.receiptSurface: count them out loud — the table adds the ones they forgot

cards.text: Group photos has {NAME} 'accidentally' cropped one specific enemy clean out of?
How many dollars did {NAME} spend drunk this month that sober {NAME} would have vetoed?
How many dollars did {NAME}'s card bleed at one bar in a single night this month?
How many hours did {NAME} log parked inside one single bar this week, per the map?
How many notes is {NAME} hiding behind a lock, all time, that this room will never get to see?
How many people is {NAME} leaving on read this week, seen and calmly ignored?
How many separate 'four easy payments' is {NAME} secretly juggling this month?
How many people this year have asked {NAME} 'where did you go?' after a silent exit?
Parking tickets {NAME} has fought in person, dead certain they were right, and lost, all time?
How many books is {NAME} stalled on under ten percent, each one still 'basically finished'?
cards.receiptSurface: reading library > progress bars, count the abandoned

cards.text: How many videos exist of {NAME} holding a microphone at a wedding nobody handed them?
Dollars {NAME} spent on food ordered after midnight this week, already horizontal in bed?
Dollars {NAME} spent on themselves this month while 'buying a gift for someone else'?
cards.receiptSurface: banking or card app > this month's transactions

cards.text: How many dollars in delivery fees alone — not one bite of food — did {NAME} pay this month?
How many dollars of liquor has {NAME} had carried to their door this month, robe-clad?
How many pushups can {NAME} crank out RIGHT NOW, on this floor, before the arms quit?
How many dollars did {NAME} throw down on rounds for this exact table this month?
How many pushups can {NAME} crank with a full-grown friend sitting on their back, demo now?
Times {NAME} has said 'we should hang out' and meant absolutely never this month?
People {NAME} would uninvite from their own funeral if they could, all time?
cards.receiptSurface: no lookup — {NAME} says the number out loud and lives with it

cards.text: Exes whose number {NAME} could still dial from memory, blackout drunk, all time?
cards.receiptSurface: they recite each number out loud — only the finished ones count

cards.text: First dates {NAME} has quietly ghosted before dessert even landed this month?
People {NAME} has muted into the void just to enjoy the silence, right now?
People {NAME} is deliberately leaving to sweat, unanswered, right now?
Rehearsed apologies {NAME} is holding hostage, unsent, right now?
How many times this month did {NAME} send someone 'call me in ten minutes' to escape a date alive?
How many people are on {NAME}'s blocked list right now, each one put there for a specific reason?
cards.receiptSurface: Settings / socials > Blocked list, count them

cards.text: Weddings {NAME} said yes to and is already scheming to bail on right now?
Old flames {NAME} still has saved under a heart right now?
cards.receiptSurface: Contacts — names saved with a heart

cards.text: Voicemails from exes {NAME} has saved but never dares replay right now?
People {NAME} has saved under a codename so nobody could ID them right now?
Contacts {NAME} would nuke on sight if this whole table went through them right now?
cards.receiptSurface: Contacts — hand the table the list

cards.text: Secrets is {NAME} sitting on right now that could detonate at least one friendship at this table?
cards.receiptSurface: just the number — do not name them

cards.text: How many pictures of a parking spot is {NAME} still keeping, long after the car came home?
cards.receiptSurface: Photos > search 'parking', count the sign shots

cards.text: How many cities does {NAME} keep the weather for that they are never once going to visit?
How many shows is {NAME} stranded halfway through, each one abandoned mid-episode forever?
How many things in {NAME}'s pockets right now would confuse a coroner — empty them onto the table.
cards.receiptSurface: empty both pockets onto the table, count the items

cards.text: How many contacts is {NAME} storing with no last name and no memory of who they are?
How many chargers does {NAME} own that charge absolutely nothing they currently possess?
cards.receiptSurface: dump the cable drawer on the table, count the orphans

cards.text: How many days has the same grocery list sat unbought in {NAME}'s notes, aging like a promise?
cards.receiptSurface: Notes > the grocery list, check the date on it

cards.text: How many loads of clean laundry are living in baskets in {NAME}'s room, never once folded?
cards.receiptSurface: walk to the room, count the baskets

cards.text: How many half-finished drinks has {NAME} abandoned around this house tonight, all of them still standing?
cards.receiptSurface: sweep the house, gather every abandoned glass, count them

cards.text: Dollars did {NAME} hand the corner store this week, never once on anything resembling a meal?
How many hairs are living in {NAME}'s shower drain right now — go look, bring back a number, no rinsing.
cards.receiptSurface: go look at the drain, report the count

cards.text: How many days running has the map put {NAME} at the same lunch counter out of pure cowardice?
What percent did {NAME} tip on their last three deliveries — the ledger does not round up for anybody.
cards.receiptSurface: delivery order history > tip line, last three orders

cards.text: How many rides did {NAME} cancel this month after a stranger had already driven across town for them?
How many hours did {NAME} hand one single glowing habit this week — the weekly report has no mercy.
cards.receiptSurface: Settings > Screen Time > weekly report, top category

cards.text: How many times has {NAME} deleted and re-downloaded the same time-sink this year, each deletion a vow?
cards.receiptSurface: store > purchase history, count the redownload dates

cards.text: How many pictures did {NAME} take of one single meal this month before eating it entirely cold?
cards.receiptSurface: Photos > this month, count the food shots

cards.text: How many boxes are parked by {NAME}'s door, bought and regretted, every one now past the return window?
cards.receiptSurface: the pile by the door, cross-checked against order history

cards.text: How many unread messages is {NAME} sitting on from one single person right now, watching them stack?
cards.receiptSurface: Messages > that one thread, the unread count

cards.text: How many people at this table is {NAME} currently in debt to, with no repayment scheduled at all?
cards.receiptSurface: open the payment ledger, count the unpaid requests

cards.text: Dollars is {NAME} owed by people in this room, tracked to the cent in a list nobody knew existed?
cards.receiptSurface: Notes > the debt list — read it out loud

cards.text: How many messages did {NAME} send this month that begin with the words 'don't tell anyone'?
How many hours did {NAME} spend parked outside a place this month without ever once going in?
cards.receiptSurface: Maps > Your Timeline, time at location

cards.text: Dollars did {NAME} move in and out of a betting account this month, the net result strictly confidential?
cards.receiptSurface: bank app > transfers to gaming merchants

cards.text: How many pictures is {NAME} keeping of other people's worst moments, filed away for later use?
cards.receiptSurface: Photos > the saved album nobody else has seen

cards.text: How many people in this room has {NAME} complained about to somebody else in this room this month?
cards.receiptSurface: Messages > search this room's names, this month

cards.text: How many drafts is {NAME} holding right now that would end something outright if a thumb slipped?
cards.receiptSurface: Messages / Mail > drafts, count the loaded ones

cards.text: Dollars did {NAME} spend this month on a hobby they have now attempted exactly one single time?
cards.receiptSurface: bank app > this month's specialty purchases

cards.text: How many accounts is {NAME} keeping money in so one specific person never sees the number?
cards.receiptSurface: bank app > list every account out loud

cards.text: How many events on {NAME}'s calendar this month are lies told to get out of seeing one person?
cards.receiptSurface: Calendar > this month, {NAME} narrates every entry

cards.text: How many people at this table would {NAME} have to warn before letting the room read one month back?
cards.receiptSurface: Messages > the number only — nobody reads them

cards.text: Dollars has {NAME} spent this year that nobody who lives with them knows a single thing about?
cards.receiptSurface: bank app > this year's charges they'd have to explain

cards.text: How many people in this room has {NAME} captured and forwarded to somebody else this month?
How many notes is {NAME} keeping behind a lock that name somebody sitting at this table?
cards.receiptSurface: Notes > Locked — count only the ones naming this room

cards.text: How many numbers is {NAME} letting ring back that they have never saved a name to, and never will?
cards.receiptSurface: Recents > unsaved numbers that keep repeating

cards.text: How many lines on {NAME}'s last statement would need a full explanation before this table let it go?
cards.receiptSurface: bank app > last statement, hand it over

cards.text: How many threads is {NAME} running right now where they are actively lying about where they are?
cards.receiptSurface: Messages > tonight's live threads — hand the brick over

cards.text: How many of the last twenty pictures {NAME} took could not survive being shown to this table?
cards.receiptSurface: Photos > the last twenty, count the unshowable

cards.text: How many recurring charges is {NAME} paying right now that they cannot say out loud in this room?
cards.receiptSurface: bank app > recurring charges, read down until one gets skipped

cards.text: How many hours of this week did {NAME} spend somewhere they told this table they were not?
cards.receiptSurface: Maps > Your Timeline, this week — hand it over
